titleStmt.title: SII 18.454: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 454. (B.K. No. 2 of 1932-33.) AGAḌI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 1726, Raktākshi, Adhika-Chaitra śu. 15, corresponding to A.D. 1804, March 26 Monday (not verifiable). It records that Sivarāya-Jōyisa, son of Jayarāma-Sāstri and the Sadara-Jōyisa of Hāvanūr was granted a piece of land by Bahadara Liṅgaṇṇa-gauḍa grandson of Dēsāyi Bahadara Liṅgappa-gauḍa of Guttaḷala, for the beautitude of his ancestors.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgajānanaḥ
. namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracā
ravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śāṁbhavē . 1 . svasti śrījayābhyudayanrupa
śyālivāhanaśakhavaraṣa 1726 raneya raktākṣi
nāmasaṁ . rada Adhikacaitra śu . 15 parvaṇi puṁ
ṇyakāladallu rikaśyākha Aślayanasutṛda kāśya
pagōtrada hāvanura sadara jōyisa sivarāyajō
yisara putra (?) paitrarādha jayarāmaśyāstrigaḷa putra
rādha sivarāyajōyisarige Apastaṁbhasūtra śu
klayajurvēdaṁtṛgata kaṁṇvaśyākhadhyāyigaḷadha
maunabhārgavagōtraptaṁnarāda dēśāyi gutta
ḷala bahadara liṁgappagauḍara pautrarāda bahadara ha
namaṁttagauḍara putrarādha bahadara liṁgaṁṇagau
ḍaru barisikoṭa bhudāna silāstāpaneyuṁ naṁ
ma hirērige Akṣayapuṁṇyalōkaprāptavāga
bēku yeṁdu koṭidhittē .
Digital edition of SII 18.454 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
